name: Set Robot Configuration
description: Return a new RobotCellState with `robot_configuration` overridden. Bridges IK output (Configuration) back into a state that can be visualized or fed into further planning.

inputParameters.name: cell_state
inputParameters.description: The RobotCellState to copy and modify.

inputParameters.name: configuration
inputParameters.description: The Configuration to set on the new state. If None, the input state is returned unchanged.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the given robot configuration.
